problem id: 30ce5200
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) AND SHR(2)) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10001011 -> 00101000
  01001000 -> 00000100
  10110100 -> 00001011
  11111111 -> 00111111
  10101010 -> 00101010
  11010011 -> 00111101
  00010100 -> 00000001
  11010100 -> 00001101
  00101101 -> 00000010

query: 00101011
predicted answer: 00000010
